message:
fix(codegen): Use captureExpr in exprToValue for proper builder state

Updated exprToValue() to use captureExpr() for all expression types
that need raw capture. This fixes the emit/builder interleaving issue
where flushBuilder() was writing content in the wrong order.

Key changes:
- ~15 AST node cases now use captureExpr(node) instead of inline capture
- Added builtin type name mapping (list, dict, set, tuple, str, bytes)
- Fixed bytes constant to use ZigValue.bytes() instead of string()

This enables the builder pattern migration for comparison and other
operators by ensuring builder state is properly saved/restored when
converting expressions to ZigValue.
